title_original: İnformasiya Təhlükəsizliyi Meneceri ( Information Security Manager )
description: Manage information security projects, support development of security policies and procedures, and coordinate with technical teams to improve security infrastructure.
requirements: At least 1 year of experience in cybersecurity, IT, or GRC
Higher education in information security, computer science, or a related field
Experience managing vendor technical relationships
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Communication and leadership skills
Good written and spoken Azerbaijani and Russian; other foreign languages are an advantage

title_original: Təhlükəsizlik Əməliyyatları Mərkəzi (SOC) bölümünün rəhbəri / Təhlükəsizlik Departamenti/Kibertəhlükəsizlik şöbəsi
description: Lead daily SOC operations, manage staffing and 24/7 coverage, coordinate incident response and threat investigation, oversee detection platforms and response plans, support audits and compliance, and drive the SOC roadmap and process improvement.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, cybersecurity, or a related field; a master’s degree is preferred
At least 5 years of cybersecurity experience including 2 to 3 years in SOC leadership or team management
Hands-on knowledge of SIEM, SOAR, EDR, and other SOC tools and technologies
Strong understanding of network protocols, firewall management, IDS/IPS, and threat investigation
Experience with security and compliance frameworks such as NIST, ISO 27001, MITRE ATT&CK, PCI DSS, and GDPR
Scripting ability for incident response automation
Strong leadership, risk management, communication, and crisis handling skills
CISM, CISSP, CCISO, or similar security management certifications are an advantage

description: Support pre-sale and post-sale cybersecurity projects, help implement client security solutions, perform vulnerability assessments and penetration testing, and maintain ISO 27001-aligned policies, risk processes, incident handling, and internal audits.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field is preferred
At least 1 year of experience in a similar cybersecurity role
Understanding of NGFW, NAC, DNS security, PAM, DLP, endpoint security, and application security
Knowledge of network security fundamentals, cryptography, GDPR, ISO 27001, and PCI DSS
Understanding of vulnerability analysis, penetration testing, and incident response
Ability to maintain accurate documentation and adapt in a fast-paced technology environment
Strong teamwork and written and verbal communication skills
Willingness to obtain relevant certifications

description: Protect sensitive corporate information, run security assessments and threat modeling, maintain incident response procedures, support awareness programs, and integrate security controls into digital transformation work.
requirements: University degree in Information Security, Informatics, Computer Science, or Management Information Systems
Minimum 3 years of professional work experience in information security and IT
Understanding of operating systems, Microsoft AD, networking, firewalls, cloud security, data privacy, virtualization, and security controls
DLP and MDM knowledge is an advantage
Knowledge of ISO 27k family, NIST CSF, COBIT, and PCI DSS
Understanding of logical and physical access security, change management, privacy, business recovery, and network technology
CompTIA Security+ or a relevant vendor security certification is an advantage
Financial sector knowledge is an advantage
Strong written and verbal communication skills for technical and non-technical audiences

description: Build and supervise security controls for business and web applications, manage access rights, investigate information security incidents, perform periodic penetration and vulnerability testing, analyze log files, and stay current on active threats and weaknesses.
requirements: Practical experience in application and web security controls
Experience with access control management
Ability to detect, register, analyze, and investigate security incidents
Hands-on work with penetration testing and vulnerability assessment
Log analysis and cyber incident prevention knowledge
Awareness of current vulnerabilities and threats affecting internal systems

description: Perform vulnerability scanning and reporting across networks, systems, web applications, and digital infrastructure; work with IT teams on remediation; conduct penetration tests; monitor defensive products; and follow static and dynamic code analysis processes.
requirements: Degree in Information Technology or Information Security
At least 1 year of work experience in Information Technology or Information Security
Excellent Azerbaijani and good English and Russian
Understanding of security systems and good network security knowledge
Experience in penetration testing for web, mobile, and IT infrastructure
Experience in security code review for applications written in C#, Python, JavaScript, and similar languages
Solid knowledge of OWASP methodology for web and mobile applications
Knowledge of WAF, Firewall, IDS/IPS, Active Directory, and SIEM
Analytical thinking, stress tolerance, teamwork, and communication skills

description: Investigate security breaches and cyber events, monitor networks for security issues, correlate signals from multiple tools and data sources, prepare attack reports and visuals, reduce false positives, improve detection rules, and work with penetration testers on vulnerability discovery.
requirements: Higher education
At least 1 year of experience in IT or cybersecurity
Experience with firewalls, proxy, SIEM, antivirus, EDR/XDR, and IDS/IPS solutions
Experience working with operating system, network audit, and other logs
Basic scripting and programming understanding
Clear and accurate reporting skills
Analytical thinking
Awareness of cyber attack types

description: Plan, implement, administer, monitor, and improve bank security controls; respond to system and network incidents; protect data and infrastructure; support change management; identify vulnerabilities through testing; and prepare reports for internal stakeholders.
requirements: Higher education
At least 2 years of experience in IT or cybersecurity
Knowledge of Windows and Unix-like server and user operating systems
Knowledge of firewalls
Understanding of scripting and programming languages
Knowledge of networks and databases
Analytical thinking and strong problem-solving ability
Awareness of cyber attack types

description: Administer existing cybersecurity platforms, deploy new security solutions and Microsoft 365 and Azure security services, harden configurations, participate in incident response, remediate audit and risk findings, and maintain technical documentation and reporting.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in IT, information security, cybersecurity, or a related field
Minimum 3 years of experience in cybersecurity, IT system administration, or a related field
Cybersecurity and IT certifications are preferred
Intermediate English proficiency
Good knowledge of network protocols and technologies such as LDAP, DNS, DHCP, Syslog, RADIUS, and SMTP
Windows Server and/or Linux administration skills
Hands-on experience with antimalware, SIEM, PAM, M365 Security, DLP, and database security tools
Strong analytical, root cause analysis, teamwork, and communication skills

description: Identify security risks and incidents, monitor and analyze security events, deploy and manage NGFW, WAF, endpoint security, threat intelligence, SIEM, vulnerability assessment, and SOAR systems, improve weakness detection mechanisms, and support pre-sale consulting.
requirements: Higher education
At least 1 year of experience in this field
Written and verbal English and Russian communication skills
Practical knowledge of cyber and information security systems
Practical knowledge of threats and vulnerabilities
Knowledge of local and global networks
Knowledge of Windows and Linux operating systems
Analytical thinking, quick decision making, organization, and teamwork
Cybersecurity certifications are desirable

description: Run regular penetration tests across networks, servers, mobile and web applications, identify vulnerabilities through scanning and code review, prepare remediation reports, coordinate fixes with IT teams, and research new attack vectors and zero-day issues.
requirements: Higher education in a relevant field is preferred
At least 1 year of relevant work experience
Excellent Azerbaijani, good English, and Russian is an advantage
Knowledge of OWASP Top 10 and common web vulnerabilities such as XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, IDOR, and session management issues
Knowledge of network, mobile, Windows, Active Directory, and Unix or Linux security
Understanding of scripting languages
Hands-on use of Nmap, Burp, Metasploit, fuzzing tools, SonarQube, Nessus, and OWASP ZAP
Strong accuracy, communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills

description: Support datacenter and perimeter security operations, triage and investigate SOC alerts, monitor traffic and logs across security tools, execute mitigation actions, document incidents, and help maintain monitoring procedures and managed security services.
requirements: University degree in a related field; engineering or science background is preferred
At least 1 year of information security or networking experience and 6 months of cybersecurity monitoring experience
Experience with change and release management and ITIL frameworks
Knowledge of cyber analytics, digital forensics, threat intelligence, and case management platforms
Knowledge of ISO 27001, ISO 27002, and PCI DSS
Experience with at least one of Cisco ASA, Juniper, Check Point, Sourcefire, Fortinet, or Palo Alto Networks
Experience with SIEM products, TCP/IP networking, Linux, Windows, routing, and access control devices
Good English and Russian with native Azerbaijani

description: Provide 24x7 SOC support, investigate cyber events, manage incidents through triage and analysis, correlate security event data, identify threats to CIA, support reporting, and improve SOC procedures.
requirements: General IT and information security knowledge
Knowledge in one or more of cloud infrastructure, networking, operating systems, databases, application development, and programming languages
1 to 2 years of experience
Bachelor’s degree
IT and cybersecurity certifications are a plus

description: Work across SOC operations, penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, source code review, and enterprise security infrastructure support for platforms such as email gateways, web proxies, WAF, and endpoint protection.
requirements: University degree in computer science, information technology, or a related field
At least 2 years of experience in at least two IT security areas such as penetration testing, incident detection and response, or management of security devices
Experience with NGFW, WAF, web proxy, antivirus, and similar security systems
Ability and willingness to learn and deliver in a challenging environment
Strong English proficiency
CEH, LPT, GPEN, OSCP, OSWE, or similar certifications are an advantage

description: Detect and eliminate confidential information leakage channels and support information security controls across enterprise services and platforms.
requirements: University degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Security, or Applied Mathematics preferred
3+ years of experience in Information Technologies, Network Administration, Telecommunication, or Information Security preferred
Networking and system administration skills
CCNP or CCNA Security certifications preferred
Understanding of MPLS and DWDM preferred
Understanding of UNIX, Windows, Mac, ERP systems, and enterprise application servers
Programming skills in C, Python, PHP, JavaScript, Ruby, Bash, or similar languages preferred
Understanding of network traffic analysis
Understanding of major information security domains including access control, identity management, authentication, application security, encryption, integrity controls, and network security

description: Monitor users, applications, networks, systems, and physical access controls, analyze security events with multiple tools, support incident investigations, document response actions, tune monitoring rules, and report on current threats and vulnerabilities.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in information technology, mathematics, or a related field
2 to 3 years of IT operations experience
CCNA, RHCSA, MCP, MCITP, or CCNA Security are preferred
Intermediate English and Russian proficiency
General cybersecurity concepts and basic log analysis skills
Knowledge of desktop and server operating systems, TCP/IP, and enterprise technologies such as Active Directory, LDAP, DNS, VPN, and DHCP
Awareness of security threats, vulnerabilities, vulnerability scanning, and antimalware tools
Strong analytical, problem-solving, multitasking, and teamwork skills

description: Maintain and improve security infrastructure, manage security system revisions and integrations, coordinate log and event management, analyze and respond to suspicious events, handle escalations, document system designs, and produce incident and status reports.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in information technology, mathematics, or a related field
3 to 5 years of system administration experience or 1 to 2 years of cybersecurity experience
CCNA, RHCSA, MCP, MCITP, CCNA Security, CompTIA Network+, or CompTIA Security+ are preferred
Intermediate English and Russian proficiency
Good understanding of firewalls, proxies, SIEM, antimalware, and IDPS concepts
Log analysis skills and good desktop and server operating system knowledge
Good knowledge of TCP/IP, routing, and switching
Awareness of security threats and vulnerabilities and enterprise technologies such as Active Directory, LDAP, DNS, VPN, and DHCP
Strong analytical, self-directed, multitasking, and teamwork skills
